step_rationale: Acute kidney injury marker post-MI; reflects renal stress and systemic hemodynamic consequence, not atherothrombotic cascade mechanistic marker.
mechanism: NGAL is released by activated neutrophils and indicates acute kidney injury and renal dysfunction occurring as a hemodynamic consequence of MI.
